DOUBLETREE BY HILTON AT THE ABQ CONVENTION CENTER - 201 MARQUETTE AVE NW Food Establishment Class C Date: 03/05/2026 - #: CAC-Food-021590-2026 - Inspection Result: Unsatisfactory Re-Inspection required Routine Food Establishment Inspection. Inspection resulted in a Closure due to low score and unsanitary conditions. Facility was not closed at the time of inspection due to PIC correcting three Priority violations and one Priority Foundation violations on site bringing score back up to an Unsatisfactory status. Facility will remain in an Unsatisfactory status while PIC corrects and repairs observed violations. CHPD inspector instructed PIC to send photo documentation of corrections and repairs to contact information provided on business card. PIC must call for re-inspection. CHPD inspector advised PIC the facility will be receiving monthly site visit to ensure rodent activity is no longer present. PIC was provided with CDC guidance to safe cleaning and removing rodent droppings. Violations corrected: 1. Food Contact Surfaces Cleaned & Sanitized- Equipment, Food-Contact Surfaces and Utensils - Clean to Sight and Touch 2. Date Marking and Disposition- Ready-To-Eat Time/Temperature Control for Safety Food, Date Marking and Disposition 3. Food Identification and Honestly Presented- Package Integrity 4. Plumbing- Physical Facilities- System Maintained in Good Repair, Repaired According to Law DOUBLETREE BY HILTON AT THE ABQ CONVENTION CENTER - 201 MARQUETTE AVE NW Food Establishment Class C Date: 03/05/2026 - #: PT0155249 - Inspection Result: Closure Re-Inspection Required
